scripts.dev: pnpm run app:cloud & wait-on tcp:9899 && pnpm run app:cloud:web & wait-on tcp:9898 && pnpm run app:tauri:cloud
scripts.build: pnpm run build:cloud && pnpm run build:rendezvous
scripts.build:cloud: pnpm --filter cloud build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-cloud && cargo check -p mhaol-rendezvous
scripts.clean:ports: for p in 9898 9899; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; true
scripts.clean: pnpm clean:ports; pnpm -r run clean && cargo clean && rm -f mhaol.db mhaol.db-wal mhaol.db-shm
scripts.app:rendezvous: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; cargo run -p mhaol-rendezvous --bin mhaol-rendezvous
scripts.app:cloud: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-cloud --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.install:deps: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libonig-dev libgstreamer1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-dev gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav
